title: UMAP-based clustering split for rigorous evaluation of AI models for virtual screening on cancer cell lines

data.name: Reproducibility archive
data.reason: Archive may contain large datasets; fetch explicitly when reproducing.

data.name: NCI-60 screening data
data.reason: Use upstream data instructions and licensing.

original_evaluation: Random, scaffold, Butina, and UMAP clustering splits
Virtual-screening models across NCI-60 cancer cell line datasets
core_generalization_finding: Random, scaffold, and Butina splits can still leave high train-test similarity and overestimate virtual-screening performance.
spectra_demo_hook: Generalize random/scaffold/Butina/UMAP comparisons into a full performance-over-novelty curve.

recommended_novelty_axes.name: umap_cluster_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: distance or adjacency over molecular UMAP clusters

recommended_novelty_axes.name: bioactivity_neighbor_overlap
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: shared activity-neighborhood labels within a cell line

recommended_novelty_axes.name: scaffold_similarity
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: shared scaffold or scaffold fingerprint similarity
